author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

"Dawn of the Freighter" Pt. 1 - Local Markets Are LIVE!

The wait is over! Local Markets are officially live in SAGE Labs. Head over to https://based.staratlas.com/ to check out the latest update and dive into the action! 

But that’s not all…  Later today, we will be introducing Infrastructure Contracts, enabling players to craft contracts and redeem them for ATLAS at sectors in need across Galia. Stay tuned, and in the meantime, explore the Local Markets and get ready for what’s coming next!

Note: Patch notes will be released alongside pt. 2 of the release later today!

 | https://based.staratlas.com/
